unresolved.note: Real Windows desktop validation is still required for tray, recording, screenshot, and hotkey behavior.

CI now covers phase branches, both Windows test projects, package validation, packaged-app smoke execution, packaged-file hash parity, uploaded validation artifacts, and a Windows Codex handoff artifact, but the WindowsDesktop test host and full interactive runtime behavior still require Windows.
Live VoiceOver and hosted docs-site accessibility validation still remain for a later remediation phase.
